findings.description: s3 and s5 are empty placeholder sections with content 'なし' and minimal hints ['常駐バッチ'], but no corresponding content sections exist in the source. The `+++++++++++++++++++++` lines in the RST source are standalone decorative separators, not heading markers (they have no associated text). Expected section structure is: s1 (intro), s2 (基本構造), s3 (業務アクションハンドラの実装), s4 (標準ハンドラ構成と主要処理フロー) — four sections, not six.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST uses `+++++++++++++++++++++` as decorative horizontal rules between h2 sections (no text follows them on the same line), while actual h2 headings use `-----` underlines with text. The three real h2 headings are: 基本構造, 業務アクションハンドラの実装, 標準ハンドラ構成と主要処理フロー.
